subcodes.first_line: O 'Atá'u'lláh! The divine bounties are beyond reckoning. He hath bestowed existence and granted being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عطاء الله عطایای الهی خارج از احصا وجود عطا فرمود و هستی بخشید و عطای
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @thankfulness; gratitude
